signals.headline: Iran-US-Israel Ceasefire Deal Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran-US-Israel Ceasefire Deal Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The United States, Israel, and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire on April 8, 2026, welcomed by the Kremlin as a de-escalation move amid risks of wider war and oil supply shocks; questions persist on exact start time due to ongoing airstrikes and suspended Strait of Hormuz shipping.[4]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
US x Iran diplomatic meeting by April 18, 2026?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 30, 2026?

signals.headline: Russia-Ukraine 32-Hour Easter Ceasefire Announced (April 10) | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Russia-Ukraine 32-Hour Easter Ceasefire Announced (April 10) | YES | MED confidence**  
Putin ordered a temporary halt to operations from 1600 April 11 to end of April 12 for Orthodox Easter, with Ukraine cautiously agreeing to mirror steps; post-announcement Ukrainian drone strikes on Russian targets suggest fragility, not a lasting resolution.[1][2][3]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Will Russia enter Ternuvate again by April 30?
